L1_headline: + SEM – William H. Frist acquired 1,109 shares (restricted stock grant). | 02/11/26
L2_brief: Director William H. Frist received 1,109 shares of restricted stock at $16.23 per share on February 11, 2026, issued in lieu of an $18,000 quarterly director retainer under the company's 2020 Equity Incentive Plan. This is routine director compensation rather than a discretionary purchase, bringing his direct holdings to 305,172 shares.

L3_detailed.pattern_notes: Routine quarterly director compensation converted to equity in lieu of cash retainer. This is a standard board compensation structure and does not represent discretionary insider buying. The grant size (~$18,000) matches the stated quarterly retainer amount.
risks_flagged: Transaction is formulaic compensation, not discretionary — limited signaling value for market sentiment
